name: The Last 32 Settled
angle: The expanded Round of 32 reaches its final day: Germany and the Netherlands are both out on penalties, Modric has bowed out at 40, Norway have a first-ever knockout win, and the last 16 begins tomorrow.

questions.question: Cristiano Ronaldo converted a penalty as Portugal edged which nation 2-1 in the Round of 32?
Erling Haaland struck the decisive goal as which country won a World Cup knockout match for the first time in its history?
Which co-host nation reached the last 16, seeing off South Africa 1-0 with a stoppage-time winner?
Germany were knocked out in the Round of 32, losing a penalty shootout to which South American side?
The Netherlands were also dumped out on penalties in the last 32. Who beat them?
Who scored twice as Spain brushed aside Austria 3-0 in the Round of 32?
The Round of 32 marked the World Cup farewell of which 40-year-old midfielder, beaten by Portugal in his final tournament?
Which World Cup debutants reached the knockout stage as the smallest nation ever to do so, drawing all three group games before meeting Argentina?
Gabriel Martinelli's stoppage-time strike sent Brazil past which side in the Round of 32?
Norway's reward for reaching the last 16 is a tie with Brazil, reviving memories of Norway's famous World Cup win over the Selecao in which year?
Spain's win over Austria was their first World Cup knockout victory since which year?
Who put Paraguay ahead against Germany before they completed their shootout upset?
Whose stoppage-time header settled Portugal's 2-1 win over Croatia?
England edged DR Congo 2-1, the Central Africans' first World Cup since they competed as Zaire in which year?
Alongside Haaland, which winger scored for Norway in their 2-1 win over Ivory Coast?

sources: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_FIFA_World_Cup_knockout_stage (Round of 32 results: Canada 1-0 South Africa (Eustaquio 90+2'); Brazil 2-1 Japan (Casemiro 56', Martinelli 90+5'); Germany 1-1 Paraguay, Paraguay won pens (Enciso 42'); Netherlands 1-1 Morocco, Morocco won pens; Ivory Coast 1-2 Norway (Nusa 39', Haaland))

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/live/world-cup-2026-bracket-scores-results-schedule-live-updates-round-of-32-173000083.html (Spain 3-0 Austria, Oyarzabal brace + Pedro Porro 66', first knockout win since 2010; Portugal 2-1 Croatia, Ronaldo penalty + Goncalo Ramos 94', Modric age 40 eliminated in final World Cup; Switzerland 2-0 Algeria)

https://www.nbcnews.com/sports/soccer/erling-haaland-deciding-goal-norway-wins-world-cup-knockout-rcna352513 (Haaland winner; Norway's first-ever World Cup knockout win; last 16 tie with Brazil, 28 years after 1998 upset)
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49089253/haaland-shines-world-cup-debut-provides-hope-norway (Norway's first World Cup since 1998; Haaland's first major tournament)

https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/6/27/cape-verde-qualify-for-world-cup-round-of-32-set-up-date-with-argentina (Cape Verde debut; smallest nation to reach a World Cup knockout round; drew all three group games; face Argentina on 3 July)

https://www.mlssoccer.com/competitions/fifa-world-cup/news/biggest-world-cup-underdog-ever-cape-verde-seek-upset-of-argentina (Cape Verde population ~525,000, smallest nation ever in a World Cup knockout stage)

https://sports.yahoo.com/soccer/article/2026-world-cup-results-standings-and-schedule-live-scores-group-stage-updates-and-how-to-watch-050724193.html (Paraguay 4-3 pens over Germany; Morocco 3-2 pens over Netherlands; England 2-1 DR Congo; USA 2-0 Bosnia; Round of 32 runs 28 June - 3 July, Round of 16 begins 4 July)
